name: @masaajid/prayer-times-web
description: Simple HTML/JS web interface for calculating prayer times using @masaajid/prayer-times library

scripts.build: bun run build:js && bun run build:html
scripts.build:js: bun build src/main.js --outdir dist --target browser --format esm --minify
scripts.build:html: cp src/index.html dist/ && cp src/style.css dist/

author: Masaajid Team
